description: Authoritative source-of-truth for top-level model IDs referenced by peer-spawn.js. Curated manually by the user. Drift between the constants pinned in src/lib/peer-spawn.js and the entries here triggers ERROR in scripts/audit-model-drift.js. Staleness of validated_at beyond staleness_threshold_days triggers WARN (forcing a cadence of human revalidation). This file is advisory-only per workflow-spec v4.3 section 6.9.2.1: it does NOT drive runtime model selection. Changes to runtime model IDs still require bump + spec edit per section 6.9.2.

codex.notes: Top-tier OpenAI Codex model at validated_at. User is on highest OpenAI subscription tier (see memory user_subscription_tier.md); no gating.

claude.notes: Full ID, not alias, per section 6.9.2 auditability clause. Top-tier Anthropic model at validated_at. User is on highest Anthropic subscription tier.
